key_factors: The aggressor holds a massive military advantage (0.06 balance) and has already seized 37.1% of the territory within only 7 days, indicating a near-collapse of conventional frontline defense. While the smaller power successfully defended some key positions this period, the sheer speed of territorial loss creates extreme military pressure. External support (32.5%) is currently insufficient to offset the aggressor's momentum. Backchannel ceasefire talks and internal factional discussions about morale suggest the government is already weighing survival strategies against potential transition or capitulation.
